info.name: SOLO API
info.description:
Import this file in Postman: **Import** → **Upload Files** → choose `backend/postman/SOLO-auth.postman_collection.json`.

**Setup:** Set collection variables **`baseUrl`** (e.g. `http://localhost:4000` — must include `http://` or `https://`) and **`accessToken`** (Supabase JWT: `Bearer` is added by each request). **`ideaId`** is filled when **Create idea** returns `201` (Tests tab), or paste a UUID from **List ideas**. If **Update** fails with “could not connect” / nothing in your API logs, check **`ideaId` is non-empty** in the resolved URL (Postman **Console**), and try **Update idea (PUT)** if a proxy blocks **PATCH**.

**Ideas API:** `GET/POST /ideas`, `PATCH` or `PUT /ideas/:id`, `DELETE /ideas/:id` — all except health require auth.

request.description: Lists all ideas for the authenticated user. Empty DB returns `[]`.

`title` and `purpose` are required. Omit `description` / `targetUser` or send empty strings if unused. Response is `201` with one idea object (snake_case keys). **Tests** script stores `id` in collection variable `ideaId` for Update/Delete.

`title` and `purpose` are required. `description` and `targetUser` are optional — omit a key to leave that field unchanged. Set **`ideaId`** (or run **Create idea** first so the test script saves it). Response **`200`** with the idea; **`404`** if missing. If Postman shows a connection error, open **View → Show Postman Console** and confirm the URL is `…/ideas/<uuid>` (not `…/ideas/`).
Same as **PATCH** — use this if **PATCH** is blocked by a proxy. Body and responses match **Update idea (editIdea) PATCH**.
Set `ideaId` to a UUID from list/create. Response `204` on success; `404` if not found or not owned.
